name: productloop-os-monorepo
description: Workspace for ProductLoop OS governance primitives and its public umbrella package.

scripts.test: npm run build && npm run test:workspaces
scripts.integration: npm run build && npm run test --workspace=productloop-os && npm run example --workspace=productloop-os && npm run cli:doctor --workspace=productloop-os
scripts.verify: npm run test:release-metadata && npm run build && npm run test:workspaces && npm run typecheck && npm run integration && npm run test:consumer-types && npm run test:consumer-types:maqam-floor && npm run pack
